meta.title: tryoud — Web Development & Performance Websites
meta.description: I build fast, high-performance websites and AI-assisted workflows. Astro + Tailwind + Cloudflare Pages. Clean code. SEO-ready.

hero.headline: Fast, SEO-ready websites—built to convert.
hero.subline: I build high-performance web experiences and AI-assisted workflows with Astro, Tailwind, and Cloudflare Pages. Minimal JS. Clean code. Real outcomes.
highlights: Modern UI with clean, maintainable components

skills.headline: Skills
skills.subline: Broad coverage across frontend, backend, DevOps, CMS, performance, and automation—always with a focus on maintainability and speed.

categories.title: Frontend
proof: Build static landing pages with minimal JS and strong Core Web Vitals
Structure pages with semantic headings and accessible navigation

categories.title: Backend
proof: Implement simple endpoints for form handling and automation triggers
Design small, maintainable interfaces between frontend and services

categories.title: DevOps
proof: Deploy static sites to Cloudflare Pages with clean build outputs (dist)
Keep dependencies minimal for reliability and speed

categories.title: CMS
proof: Model content to reduce hardcoding and improve maintainability
Build structured sections that stay consistent across pages

categories.title: Performance & SEO
proof: Optimize above-the-fold content and defer non-critical assets
Set up baseline SEO metadata and proper heading structure

categories.title: Automation
proof: Create reliable contact flows with honeypot anti-spam
Automate small business workflows around lead intake and follow-ups

stack.headline: Tech Stack
stack.subline: A practical, modern stack optimized for performance, reliability, and low maintenance overhead.

projects.headline: Projects
projects.subline: Selected work across high-performance websites, structured content builds, and practical automation.

items.title: Portfolio Website (Astro + Tailwind)
items.description: A static-first portfolio optimized for speed, clean UI, and maintainable content sourced from JSON.
outcomes: Static rendering and minimal JS for fast load times
Reusable sections driven by a single JSON source of truth

items.title: Performance-First Landing Page
items.description: A conversion-focused landing page with strong hierarchy, responsive layout, and optimized assets.
outcomes: Clear CTA placement and section flow
Optimized images and lazy loading below the fold
Clean semantic HTML for accessibility and SEO

items.title: Structured CMS Build (Content Modeling)
items.description: A CMS approach focused on repeatable blocks, structured fields, and minimal editorial friction.
outcomes: Reduced hardcoded content via structured fields

items.title: Lead Intake + Automation Pipeline
items.description: A simple, robust contact flow using forms, spam protection, and workflow-ready data.
outcomes: Honeypot anti-spam and clear success/error states
Clean payload structure for downstream automations

about.headline: How I work
about.subline: A lightweight process that keeps projects moving fast—without sacrificing quality.
paragraphs: I design and build performance-first websites that are easy to maintain and ship. The goal is always the same: a clean UI, strong SEO foundations, and a clear conversion path.
I prefer static-first architectures where possible—less complexity, fewer moving parts, and better Core Web Vitals.

process.title: Scope & structure
process.details: Define sections, content model, and success metrics (performance + conversion).

process.title: Design system
process.details: Set typography, spacing, and reusable components for consistent UI.

process.title: Build & optimize
process.details: Implement static pages, optimize images, and keep JS minimal.

process.title: Ship & iterate
process.details: Deploy to Cloudflare Pages, validate SEO basics, iterate based on feedback.

contact.headline: Contact
contact.subline: Want a fast, modern website or an automation workflow? Send a message and I’ll get back to you.

footer.note: Built with Astro + Tailwind. Deployed on Cloudflare Pages.
